description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style shelving unit featuring a dark metal frame with visible bolts at the corners and cross-bracing on the sides and back for added structural integrity. The shelves themselves are made of wood with a rich, medium-brown finish, providing a warm contrast to the cool, matte-black metal. The unit consists of three open shelves, each offering ample horizontal storage space without any doors or drawers. The design is open on all sides except for the cross-braced back and sides, making it easy to access items from the front or sides. The overall aesthetic is utilitarian yet stylish, suitable for urban environments such as lofts, garages, or modern public spaces. The construction suggests durability and the ability to support heavy objects, making it ideal for both decorative and practical storage.
description: A sturdy, industrial-style shelving unit with a black metal frame and three open wooden shelves, featuring cross-bracing for support. Its open design and robust materials make it suitable for urban or industrial settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cross-braced metal frame and three open wooden shelves.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the solid metal frame without cross-bracing visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with prominent cross-bracing and full visibility of the shelf structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and open shelf design.
